pages.text: When placing a Magic Center, you choose from three radius options:$(br2)$(bold)Radius 5$() - Costs 5 seconds of Bleeding$(br)$(bold)Radius 7$() - Costs 7 seconds of Bleeding$(br)$(bold)Radius 9$() - Costs 9 seconds of Bleeding

The radius determines two things:$(br2)$(li)The area in which magic circles are detected and powered$(li)The base fuel consumption rate (larger radius = more fuel per minute)$(br2)Magic circles must be within the center's radius (horizontally) and on the same Y-level (+/- 1 block) to be counted.
